THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/24/16 IS CONTINUED TO 02/06/17 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE:JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK:DOKAZAKI; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DECLARATION OF TERRENCE J. BRASCH OF RECEIPT OF NO OPPOSITION TO JOSEPH OGLES MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AS TO PLAINTIFF ALFRED HERNANDEZ (TRANSACTION ID # 60067113) FILED BY DEFENDANT OGLE, JOSEPH

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT JOSEPH OGLE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AS TO PLAINTIFF ALFRED HERNANDEZ. THOSE WHO HAVE NOT MADE AN APPEARANCE ARE DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: NO OPPOSITION FILED; MOTION GRANTED. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT JOSEPH OGLE ON THE CLAIMS OF PLAINTIFF BRIAN GREEN AND ALFRED HERNANDEZ. THE COURT NOTES THAT MR. GREEN AND MR. HERNANDEZ HAVE FAILED TO COMPLY WITH JUDGE KAHN'S ORDER OF OCTOBER 5, 2016 REQUIRING THEM TO APPEAR FOR A DEPOSITION. AS JUDGE KAHN PREVIOUSLY NOTED, THE FACT THAT MR. GREEN AND MR. HERNANDEZ HAVE NOT OBTAINED COUNSEL DOES NOT EXCUSE THEIR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT A DEPOSITION. THE COURT FURTHER NOTES THAT TRIAL IS SET FOR FEBRUARY 6, 2017. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion Of Joseph Ogle For Terminating Sanctions As To Plaintiff Alfred Hernandez
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOSEPH OGLE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AS TO PLAINTIFF ALFRED HERNANDEZ.

Appearances: David F. Beach of Bishop Barry (510.596.0888) for defendant and moving party; No other appearances.

Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: No opposition filed; motion granted. Judgment shall be entered in favor of Defendant Joseph Ogle on the claims of Plaintiff Brian Green and Alfred Hernandez. The Court notes that Mr. Green and Mr. Hernandez have failed to comply with Judge Kahn's order of October 5, 2016 requiring them to appear for a deposition. As Judge Kahn previously noted, the fact that Mr. Green and Mr. Hernandez have not obtained counsel does not excuse their failure to appear at a deposition. The Court further notes that trial is set for February 6, 2017. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
